title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 650.056 - Evidence capable of being tested for DNA must be preserved
text:
650.056.  Evidence capable of being tested for DNA must be preserved. — Any evidence leading to a conviction of a felony described in subsection 1 of section 650.055 which has been or can be tested for DNA shall be preserved by the investigating law enforcement agency.
(L. 2001 S.B. 267 § 1, A.L. 2006 S.B. 1023)
